evals.prompt: Add a new source file src/auth/sessionStore.ts in a repo where neighboring files have .summary.md sidecars. Make sure future agents can find it.
evals.expected_output: Creates the source file and a matching sidecar summary using the local convention, with concise retrieval-oriented sections rather than implementation duplication.
assertions: Checks nearby files to infer the sidecar documentation convention.
Creates a matching sidecar doc for the new source file when the project uses sidecars.
Documents purpose, exports or entry points, side effects, and relevance guidance when useful.
Keeps the sidecar concise and retrieval-oriented rather than duplicating implementation details.

evals.prompt: Update src/payments/webhook.ts so it writes an idempotency record before processing Stripe events. There is an existing src/payments/webhook.ts.md sidecar.
evals.expected_output: Updates the source and updates the existing sidecar because the edit changes side effects and relevance for idempotency/payment webhook debugging.
assertions: Reads the changed source file and its existing sidecar doc.
Recognizes that adding an idempotency write is a retrieval-relevant side effect change.
Updates the sidecar's side effects or relevant-when guidance accordingly.
Does not rewrite unrelated sidecar content unnecessarily.

evals.prompt: Rename src/config/loader.ts to src/config/loadConfig.ts. The project has matching file.ext.md sidecar docs.
evals.expected_output: Renames or moves the matching sidecar doc, updates the heading/path and obvious references, and keeps source/doc names synchronized.
assertions: Moves or renames the sidecar doc to match the renamed source file.
Updates the sidecar heading or path from loader.ts to loadConfig.ts.
Updates obvious nearby references when present.
Does not leave an orphan sidecar for the old source path.

evals.prompt: Delete src/legacy/oldExporter.ts. There is a src/legacy/oldExporter.ts.md file next to it.
evals.expected_output: Deletes the source and matching sidecar doc, and removes obvious references from nearby module docs if needed.
assertions: Deletes the matching sidecar doc when deleting the source file.
Checks for obvious references in nearby module docs or indexes.
Does not leave stale documentation claiming the deleted file exists.

evals.prompt: In src/components/LoginButton.tsx, change the label text from 'Log in' to 'Sign in'. The repo has sidecar docs, but this is just a copy change.
evals.expected_output: Makes the localized source change and skips sidecar updates because retrieval-relevant facts did not change, optionally noting the skip briefly.
assertions: Recognizes the edit as a tiny copy change that does not affect purpose, exports, dependencies, side effects, or relevance guidance.
Does not update the sidecar doc unnecessarily.
May briefly report that sidecar maintenance was skipped because retrieval facts did not change.
